name: tilo-14--solana-rent-free-dev
description: Build Solana applications 200x cheaper for stablecoin payments, agent payments, DeFi, airdrops, token distribution, and ZK applications using Light Protocol's rent-free token accounts, mint accounts, and PDAs. Covers client development (TypeScript, Rust) and program development (Rust) across Anchor, native Rust, and Pinocchio.
